title: crassina tenuiflora
intro: Crassina tenuiflora, a flowering plant native to Australia, belongs to the family of Rutaceae and is commonly known as the 'native lemon myrtle'. The medicinal properties of Crassina tenuiflora lie in its essential oils, which possess antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of the plant include its potential in reducing stress and anxiety, as well as its ability to aid in digestion and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Herbal preparations of Crassina tenuiflora include tea, oil, and capsules, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
